identity.name: USA.edu Future Portal
identity.description: A cutting-edge application portal that blends the sterility of medical science with the immersion of a sci-fi command center. Dark, moody, but illuminated by data.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tracking tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, inputs, and labels. High legibility.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00B4D8] text-white hover:bg-[#0096B4] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,180,216,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#00B4D8]/30 text-[#00B4D8] hover:bg-[#00B4D8]/10 hover:border-[#00B4D8] rounded-full px-8 py-6
buttons.ghost: text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.glass: bg-[#0A0E14]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl hover:border-[#00F5FF]/30 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-[#00F5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F5FF] text-white placeholder:text-slate-600 h-12 rounded-xl transition-all duration-300

navigation.sidebar: bg-[#0A0E14]/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border-r border-white/5 w-64 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 z-50
navigation.topbar: bg-[#0A0E14]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-40

general: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'Figtree' for body.
Implement Dark Mode by default. Add 'dark' class to html/body.
Use Glassmorphism for all cards and panels: bg-opacity-60 + backdrop-blur-xl.
Do NOT use solid white backgrounds. Use #0A0E14 or #11161F.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds (Text-slate-200 or lighter).
dashboard: Use a Bento Grid layout (Grid cols 12).
Widgets should have a thin border (border-white/10) and glow on hover.
Progress bars should use the Neon Cyan (#00F5FF) color.
forms: Split long forms into steps (Progressive Disclosure).
Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect for active inputs (glow border).
Validation errors should be clear but not jarring (Soft Red text).

universal_guidelines: Micro-interactions on every click and hover.
Images must be high quality and relevant.
Accessibility is paramount: Ensure keyboard navigation works.
